Global (All).summary: Conflict in Ukraine: Russia continues to support separatist rebels, causing escalating tensions between Russia and NATO
Covid-19 pandemic: New variant detected in South Africa, prompting increased caution from governments worldwide
Climate Change: Devastating floods in Germany and Belgium highlight the growing threat of extreme weather events

United States.title: House Committee Votes to Hold Merrick Garland in Contempt Over FISA Documents
United States.summary: A Republican-led House committee voted to hold Attorney General Merrick Garland in contempt of Congress, escalating a standoff over FISA surveillance documents.

United States.title: US Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas's Wife Invested in Tech Firm With Stakes in Cases Before the Court
United States.summary: US Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas's wife, Virginia Thomas, invested in a tech firm with significant stakes in cases before the US Supreme Court.

United States.title: New York City Mayor Adams and Police Commissioner Sewell Clash Over Crime Fighting Measures
United States.summary: New York City Mayor Eric Adams and Police Commissioner Keechant Sewell clashed over crime-fighting measures, amid rising concerns about public safety in the city.

South Korea.title: Seoul Mayor's Arrest Reignites Political Tensions
South Korea.summary: Seoul Mayor Oh Se-hoon's arrest on Tuesday, 26 June 2026, has sparked intense political debates and calls for his support amidst allegations of corruption.

South Korea.title: North Korea Fires Ballistic Missile Off Coast
South Korea.summary: North Korea fired a ballistic missile off its eastern coast on Wednesday, 27 June 2026, defying international criticism and increasing regional tensions.

South Korea.title: South Korean Protestors Demand Greater Transparency
South Korea.summary: Thousands of anti-government protesters gathered in Seoul, 28 June 2026, to demand greater transparency in the government's dealings and a stronger opposition.

Japan.title: Earthquake hits Tokyo, Japan
Japan.summary: A 5.6-magnitude earthquake struck Tokyo, causing widespread damage and power outages.

Japan.title: Rival groups clash in Ishikawa, Japan
Japan.summary: Tensions between rival groups in the city of Kanazawa escalated, resulting in violent clashes between the two factions.

Japan.title: North Korea conducts missile test near Japanese waters
Japan.summary: North Korea launched an intermediate-range missile into the Sea of Japan, raising concerns about regional security.
